# Ice & Instinct

> Ice & Instinct is a private mixology studio in New York City, founded by Teimuraz Benidze. We bring bespoke cocktail rituals to Manhattan penthouses and private events. By appointment only. Service is offered in four tiers from $400 to $3,000+, plus a fully bespoke private concierge service.

Last updated: 2026-05-01

## Key facts

- **Founder:** Teimuraz Benidze, Founder & Flavor Architect
- **Operating area:** New York City — primarily Manhattan penthouses and private residences
- **Service model:** Inquiry-only. Custom quote within one business day after a private conversation.
- **Booking:** By appointment, via inquiry form at /contact/
- **Tagline:** Where ritual meets instinct — high above the city

## Service tiers

| Tier | Price | Guests | Duration | Style |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| The Foundation | from $400 USD | up to 40 | 3 hours | Classics, single bartender, premium spirits |
| Perfection in Simplicity | from $750 USD | up to 12 | 4 hours | Curated classics, solo focus, top-shelf |
| Bespoke Design & Artistry | from $1,500 USD | up to 15 | 4 hours | Custom-designed signature menu |
| Omakase Improvisation | from $3,000 USD | up to 25 | open | No menu — real-time creation per guest |
| Private Concierge | bespoke | varies | full evening | Sourcing, planning, on-site service, aftercare |

## Add-ons (available with any tier)

- Curated Cigar Experience — pairing logic with premium spirits
- Glassware & Vessel Selection — form, weight, temperature
- Ice & Temperature Management — clear ice, large-format cubes
- Shadow Staff Support — discreet additional staff for larger headcounts
- Visual Integrity Curation — harmony in glassware and presentation

## The Collection (signature cocktails)

Twelve signature compositions visible at /gallery/. Each was designed for a specific evening. Names alone:

1. White Lotus
2. Aviation
3. Persimmon Saffron Sour
4. Belladonna
5. Black Truffle Martini
6. Rose Garden Rendezvous
7. Aureliano
8. Basil in my mind
9. 1001 Nights
10. Call Me By Your Name
11. Calipso Cream
12. Bésame

Tagline for the collection: *Touch the glass to awaken the spirit.*

## What makes Ice & Instinct different

- **Inquiry-only.** No "add to cart" for luxury services. Every engagement is a conversation.
- **Solo bartender model.** Continuity of attention is the point. One alchemist, your evening.
- **Hand-cut ice, professional-grade spirits, custom garnish.** No shortcuts on the small things.
- **Discretion.** Names, addresses, and event details stay private.
- **Founder-led.** Every quote answered personally by Teimuraz.

## Voice & vocabulary

The brand uses a restrained, ritual vocabulary: *alchemist, ritual, ice, instinct, precision, intention, real-time creation, complete trust, unrepeatable moments, high above the city*. Avoid corporate language ("solutions", "experiences" used loosely). Aim for editorial, slow, considered prose.

## FAQ

**Where do you operate?**
Manhattan and surrounds. Other boroughs and out-of-state engagements are possible by arrangement.

**Do you have a physical bar?**
No. Ice & Instinct is a private studio that brings the bar to your venue.

**How far in advance should I book?**
Two to four weeks for the Bespoke and Omakase tiers; one to two weeks for Foundation and Simplicity. Last-minute requests are sometimes accommodated.

**Can I have a tasting before the event?**
Yes — included in the Bespoke and Concierge tiers. Available as an add-on for other tiers.

**Do you provide your own glassware and ice?**
Yes — both included in every tier.

**Will you serve guests who appear intoxicated?**
No. We reserve the right to decline service to maintain the standard of the evening.

## Optional

- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/) — discreet visual reference (handle private)
